hero.title: Turn AI conversations into structured knowledge
hero.desc: Upload `.json` (Gemini CLI) or `.md` (OpenCode) files and choose from **4 providers** — Ollama, Gemini, OpenAI and Anthropic — to generate structured summaries in **6 sections** with streaming, markdown downloads and **TOON format for token savings**.

howto.title: How to use
howto.steps:
2. Choose a provider: **Ollama**, **Gemini**, **OpenAI** or **Anthropic**
3. Choose prompt format: **Markdown** or **⚡ TOON** (token-efficient)
4. Upload one or more `.json` or `.md` conversation files
5. Click **Generate Summary** and watch the streaming
6. Download the `.md` or generate a **continuity prompt**

ollama.name: Ollama
ollama.desc:
- Local models
- Zero cost · Zero API key
- Full privacy

openai.name: OpenAI
openai.desc:
- GPT-5.5 · GPT-5.4 · GPT-5.4 Mini
- Requires API key
- Premium tier

gemini.name: Gemini
gemini.desc:
- 2.0 Flash · 3.x Preview
- Requires API key
- Prepaid credits

anthropic.name: Anthropic
anthropic.desc:
- Claude Opus 4.8 · Sonnet 4.6 · Haiku 4.5
- Requires API key
- 1M token context

toon.title: TOON — Token savings
toon.desc:
This project supports **TOON (Token-Oriented Object Notation)**, a compact prompt format that removes emojis, markdown and timestamps — reducing **~10-15% of tokens** per request without changing the conversation content.

- **Markdown**: `### 🔥 Developer _14:30:00_` → more readable for the AI
- **TOON**: `role:user ts:14:30:00` → more efficient, same result
- Switch formats in the Summarizer sidebar
- Token counter visible before and during generation

sidebar.title: Session Summarizer
sidebar.upload_help: Supported formats: Gemini CLI (.json), OpenCode (.md). Limit: 50 MB per file.
sidebar.history_empty: No summaries generated in this session.
sidebar.history_expiry: History auto-expires after 30 days. Download summaries you want to keep before then.
sidebar.provider_help_ollama: Ollama runs locally (no API key). Gemini uses Google AI Studio API.
sidebar.provider_help_cloud: Ollama unavailable in this environment. Use Gemini (API key) or run the project locally to use Ollama.
sidebar.cloud_info: Cloud environment — Ollama requires a local server. Use **Gemini** with an API key or run the project locally to use free models.
sidebar.format_help: TOON reduces ~5-15% of tokens by removing visual formatting. Markdown keeps emojis and timestamps (more readable for the AI).
sidebar.no_ollama: Ollama not detected. If running locally, start with `ollama serve`. If on cloud (free demo), use the Gemini provider.
sidebar.source_placeholder: e.g. Gemini CLI, OpenCode, VS Code chat...

key.title: API Key
key.passphrase_too_short: Master password must be at least 8 characters.
key.encrypt_info: Your key is encrypted with a master password before being saved. Only the encrypted blob is stored — LGPD compliant.

warnings.gemini_credits_cloud: Gemini API requires prepaid credits. Add credits at [AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/apikey).
warnings.gemini_credits_local: ⚠️ **Important notice:** Google has discontinued the free tier for the Gemini API. All requests now require **prepaid credits** purchased at [AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/apikey). We recommend using **Ollama** (local models, no cost).
warnings.no_api_key: Configure an API key to use the {provider} provider.
warnings.no_api_key_cloud: On Streamlit Cloud, add `{env_key}` in App Settings → Secrets.
warnings.no_api_key_local: Use the 🔑 API Key field above or configure in .env.
warnings.select_model: Select or enter an Ollama model.

errors.internal: Internal error while processing. Please try again.
errors.internal_prompt: Internal error while generating prompt. Please try again.
errors.no_messages: No relevant messages found in the uploaded files.
errors.too_many_messages: Message limit of {max} exceeded ({found} found). Split into smaller files.

chat.empty_state: 👈 Upload one or more files (.json or .md) of LLM conversations and click **Generate Summary** to begin.
